item.title: Republican Gaslighting
item.description:
The Vice President of the United States lies to its citizens.
That the majority of their party is filled with white supremacists.
Folks, let there be no mistake. These folks want to be the modern day Nazis.

item.title: Mitch McConnell Slipped And Fell After A Reporter Asked: "Do you support ICE taking working people off the streets and kidnapping them?"
item.description:
McConnell fell in the Russell Basement, was helped up and appeared to be okay. He appeared to say "later", waving to the camera.
Lucifer tweeted back.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.dc:creator: TheRealSauceBoss

item.title: It's my 4th Cakeday & This is My 1st Dump.
item.description:
Been lurking since 2012, joined 2021, this is my first post so go easy on me?
Created an account much later
Come here mainly for dumps
Greatly enjoy memes
Considering I'm from the Angry Kid/Teen Girl Squad era
Okay, I was in Uni then but still...
I'm from Cape Breton Island, Nova Scotia, originally
Now I live in Mississauga with my partner Malcolm
I'm a performer (opera/operetta/musical theatre) - I do a lot of G&S
I have a decent admin job short hours good pay and I'm sorry for bragging.
I'm fairly clumsy and have bad luck
But in like a Mr. Bean way - not tragic backstory way
"YOU GOTTA KNOW WHAT A CRUMPET IS TO UNDERSTAND CRICKET" is STILL one of the best lines of dialogue captured on film.
My partner and I love to travel, and eat good food, and wine.
Raised by strong women, I love this thread
And chips.
I also host/emcee various events. Recently ended a 2.5 year stint hosting Opera Pubs which are exactly what you think
And next month I'll be hosting an opera/professional wrestling gala "Let's get ready to REEECIIIIIIIIIIT!"
I'm not a doctor but I play one in 200 year old operas.
I love coming to Imgur (recent Business Daddy drama included) but y'all really are a community
And I love non-toxic positivity from strangers
And I SUPER LOVE when people get excited about their "things" (hobbies, work, kids, pets, etc...)
My favourite cocktail is a French75
My favourite food is Pizza (see: NT Obsession)
And I hope you all stay fresh, cheesebags. Take care of each other. ETA: my first post and most viral??? I knew I liked you folx!
item.dc:creator: giggyhertz

item.title: The bloom distracts from the thorns.
item.description:
My Yor Forger cosplay from Spy x Family. From cozy sweater to bloodstained grace. Casual Yor was one of my favorite sets, but the Thorn Princess demanded her turn. Finally, she joins my cosplay collection, just in time for Season 3. (Konelli - https://www.instagram.com/konelli.cosplay/)
Reference
item.dc:creator: Konelli

item.title: Getting new foster kittens!
item.description: So Thelma and Louise went back to the humane society to be fixed and put up for adoption yesterday, and Mario and Luigi have been let out of the kitten room, so Jess just texted to ask if I can handle four more kittens. She said they’re about six weeks old and their mama was run over by a car. The guy taking care of them has been feeding them cows milk so they have really bad diarrhea. I just deep cleaned the kitten room so I guess I can handle some leaky butts haha. I’m going to pick them up in a couple of hours, wish me luck!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Playing Some More MTG
item.description:
Playing MTG again! Also found the perfect land card for myself. I got so many questions about what Commanders I play after you all heard I like Commander (it's what most folks are playing lately in my hive at least). My Favs: The First Sliver, The 10th Doctor/Rose Tyler, Ellivere, and Teval. What about you all?"
Yesssss
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1496 (buried out back)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. Today's edition contains some Deep Cody Lore, so BUCKLE UP
Mood.
Yuuup
I do often wish I was a Star Trek energy being. No body, just energy. Especially right now during allergy season.
Yuuuup
It's stability!
Evangelical Protestants in a nutshell.
Excited to get started on Goliath's Curse: The History and Future of Societal Collapse, once I finish up with Humanism and Terror.
Speaking of allegations, its time for the Deep Cody Lore: I am pretty sure I met, accidentally, Epstein and Maxwell, like 30ish years ago, and they tried to abduct me in Monterey, California, when I was about 12 years old.
This very well-to-do, well-dressed couple tried to shepherd me away from my parents because [memory piece missing], and then kept saying how cute and adorable I was, and insisted on getting a picture with me, to remember me by... with my camera, and something in my brain clicked and screamed danger, so after they got a passerby to take the photo, I took the camera back, graciously thanked them, saying I needed to get back to my parents, and their kind faces soured and I bolted the fuck out of there. This being the Days of Yore, this was a film camera. I tore that photo up because my reaction was so visceral to them. I can't prove it was them, and like I said, memory is a tricky, unreliable thing... but i'm pretty sure it was them. So yeah. Anyway.
I can't be 100 percent sure it was them, but I saw a picture of them from about that time and it suddenly clicked: they looked a lot like my memory of that couple.
I mean, even if it wasn't them, I sure as fuck was gonna be trafficked.
Anyway.
A Neanderthal with a Yellow Bunting
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin? Peekaboo! Beep." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Lifting 105 lbs today. Really proud of my progress.
item.description: Today has been an awesome day. It has been challenging the last several months when im lifting. But today was different. It didn't feel as heavy. I hope everyone is doing well and having a wonderful day.
item.dc:creator: kaosnole95

item.title: Conservatives in the United States are Nazis.
item.description: Their legislation, their worldview, and their actions all mirror, or, quote, Nazi and fascist ideals. And it sucks knowing that there are supporters of them on this site.
item.dc:creator: SquaresNews
